growth_chart.projection_basis: Early-stage model — only 2 sessions of history. Based on 1.59% single-day gain and sector momentum. Will recalibrate each Friday as history accumulates.

next_decisions.thesis: INTC/MU correlation pattern confirmed. MU breakout above 200-day MA would trigger sector-wide acceleration — directly benefits INTC position.
Sector accelerant candidate showing bullish signal. Currently in no-chase mode — waiting for 3-5% pullback to valid entry zone before committing capital.
Leading position at +9.18%. GTC stop active. Will add fractional shares on continued momentum — subject to 25% cap check at entry time.
3 of 10 slots used. Targeting 5–6 positions for diversification. Priority: non-semiconductor name to reduce INTC/ARKK/NVDA sector correlation risk.

intelligence_evolution.summary: Established core position framework across 3 tickers. Identified INTC/MU sector correlation. Confirmed fractional order API constraints via live execution. First successful dual-entry session with ARKK and NVDA.
intelligence_evolution.key_insight: Fractional limit orders are rejected by Robinhood API. Switched to market orders for all fractional share buys and locked this into operating protocol permanently.

strategy_dna.note: Hard guardrail. Never evaluated, never overridden.
Enforced pre-trade via get_portfolio. No exceptions regardless of conviction level.
New entries at AM open only. AH and mid-session are analysis and planning — no new entries.
No market orders on gap-ups above 2%. Queue limit 2–3% below open print, or hold cash and reassess.
Whole-share positions only. Fractional positions use manual session-by-session price check — GTC conditional orders not supported by API.
Locked in after API validation Jun 25. Dollar-amount market orders for all fractional buys. Limit orders require whole-share quantities.
Every trade must trace to a private-capital vector. No impulse entries.
INTC/MU confirmed Jun 24. Tracking AMD/NVDA/ARM cluster — needs 3+ more sessions to validate. Expanding model.

risk_profile.notes: All 3 active positions are in the technology/semiconductor cycle — high sector correlation. Strong cash reserve (73%) provides excellent entry optionality. Risk normalizes as slots fill with non-correlated names across different sectors.

milestones.label: $55 — Early Momentum
milestones.notes: First milestone. Validates initial sector thesis and 3-position strategy.

milestones.label: $60 — Foundation Confirmed
milestones.notes: Target 5–6 active positions by this point. Sector diversification improving.

milestones.label: $75 — Growth Phase
milestones.notes: 7–8 active positions expected. Pattern library fully stress-tested across market conditions.

milestones.label: $100 — First Century
milestones.notes: Full 10-slot deployment. Strategy proven across multiple market cycles.

weekly_recap.summary: Week 1 operational. CLU established its first 3-position portfolio across semiconductors and innovation. INTC leads with +9.18% total gain. ARKK and NVDA are fresh entries — too early for directional confirmation. Cash reserve at 73.3% preserves strong optionality heading into next week. Primary focus: sector diversification and momentum confirmation on INTC. No losses. No stop-loss alerts. Protocol performing as designed.
